title: AC Energy Monitor Dashboard
description: ESP32-based whole-house AC energy monitor measuring mains voltage, current, real power, and power factor using a ZMPT101B voltage transformer and SCT-013-030 CT clamp, processed with EmonLib. Readings published to MQTT and a local web dashboard; daily energy (kWh) stored on microSD. OLED shows live V / I / W / PF.
objective: Monitor mains voltage (±2 %), current (0–30 A, ±3 %), real power (W), power factor, and daily kWh accumulation; MQTT publish every 10 s; local web dashboard; OLED live display; 12-month data log on SD.
constraints: 230 V AC mains (single phase); ESP32 DevKit; 5 V USB power; safety isolation provided by ZMPT101B; ≤ £25 BOM.
supporting_fact_titles: AC Power Factor and True Power Measurement via Current and Voltage Sensing
CT Clamp Current Sensing and RMS Calculation
MQTT Protocol for IoT Sensor Data
NTP Time Synchronisation for Data Logging
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface
design_element_titles: AC Mains Power Meter (ZMPT101B + SCT-013 + EmonLib)

element_usage_notes.AC Mains Power Meter (ZMPT101B + SCT-013: ZMPT101B biased at 2.5 V into ADC1 GPIO 35 (VP); SCT-013-030 with 33 Ω burden + 2× 10 kΩ bias divider into GPIO 34. EmonLib VCAL=234.26, ICAL=111.1. 20-cycle sample window at 50 Hz.
element_usage_notes.ESP32 WiFi + MQTT IoT Telemetry: Broker at home LAN; topic energy/monitor; retained status payload; 10-s publish interval. HTTP server on port 80 serves simple JSON API /api/now.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 128×64; 4-line layout: V_rms / I_rms / P_real (W) / PF; updates at 2 Hz.
element_usage_notes.MicroSD 1 Hz Time-Series Data Logger: SD CS=GPIO 5; CSV: iso_ts, V_rms, I_rms, P_W, PF, kWh_today; one row per minute; daily kWh accumulated.
element_usage_notes.NTP UTC Timestamped Data Logging: NTP synced on boot; ISO 8601 timestamp on each CSV row; fallback to millis() if NTP unavailable.

element_interactions.from: AC Mains Power Meter (ZMPT101B + SCT-013 + EmonLib)
element_interactions.data: v_rms (float), i_rms (float), real_power_w (float), pf (float) every 10 s
element_interactions.description: EmonLib calcCalcIrms() and calcVI() called with 1480 samples; results averaged over 3 EmonLib cycles. kWh_today accumulated as P × Δt / 3600.

element_interactions.data: I²C framebuffer (v_rms, i_rms, p_w, pf) at 2 Hz
element_interactions.description: OLED shows live readings; PF displayed as 0.00–1.00; 'ALERT' flashed if PF < 0.7 (reactive load warning).

element_interactions.data: CSV row (iso_ts, V, I, P, PF, kWh_today) every 60 s
element_interactions.description: Appended to POWER.CSV on SD. File rolls over at midnight (new date prefix). SD CS on GPIO 5.
